overall.description: A static observation followed by a walk through a grand Gothic great hall with dark wood paneling, iron chandeliers, and long dining tables, rendered in a video game engine. The scene transitions from a stationary view of the hall's interior to a first-person walk toward an exit door, passing a spiral staircase and tall arched windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with long wooden tables and high vaulted ceilings

agents.ego_description: standing still at eye level observing the great hall interior

entered.detail: large circular clock mounted on the far wall above the main entrance
ornate iron chandeliers hanging from the vaulted ceiling providing warm illumination
long wooden dining tables arranged in rows throughout the hall
tall arched windows with blue night light visible through them
wooden railings of an upper balcony level overlooking the hall

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a grand Gothic dining hall with high vaulted ceilings, illuminated by warm chandelier light. The camera faces a large clock on the far wall, with long wooden tables arranged in the center and arched windows showing night sky on the left. Sparse figures are seated at the distant tables.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall approaching entrance foyer with spiral staircase

events.description: camera begins walking forward through the hall toward the exit door

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the great hall toward the wooden exit door

entered.detail: wooden spiral staircase with ornate railings leading to upper level
tall stained glass window with intricate gothic tracery at the end of the hall
large dark wooden door with metal studs and arched stone frame
circular patterned rug on the floor near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through the great hall, turning left to approach a spiral staircase and large gothic window. The perspective shifts toward a heavy wooden entrance door, passing ornate candelabras and a decorative floor rug, leaving the central dining area and clock behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot begins as a static observation of a grand Gothic dining hall before transitioning into a first-person walk toward a distant exit. It starts with a stationary view of the vaulted ceiling and long wooden tables, facing a large clock on the far wall under the warm glow of chandeliers. As the camera begins to move forward, it leaves the central dining area and the seated figures behind, turning left to approach a spiral staircase and a large gothic window. The perspective then shifts past ornate candelabras and a decorative floor rug, moving away from the hall's interior. Finally, the camera advances toward a heavy wooden entrance door, completing the journey from the heart of the hall to its threshold.
